validation_results.code_quality: High. The implementation uses robust set-based arithmetic for delta computation and includes a thorough test suite covering edge cases.
edge_cases_covered: Handling of None values in git state

criteria_verification.notes: Baseline is recorded unconditionally before each task invocation via _record_baseline().
Delta computation via _compute_file_delta ensures only per-task changes are detected.
_create_synthetic_direct_mode_report now uses the computed delta instead of raw git detection.
Verified by test_delta_first_task_reports_all_changes; empty baseline results in all changes being reported.
13 unit tests passed, covering snapshotting, delta logic, and baseline resets.
Logging added to _create_player_report_from_task_work to show baseline and delta counts.

rationale: The implementation successfully addresses the requirement to scope git detection to per-task changes. The use of set-based deltas is a clean and effective solution. All acceptance criteria were verified through independent test execution, and the code quality is high with comprehensive test coverage. Minor honesty discrepancies were identified as non-critical reporting artifacts.
